summary: Taiki has explicitly flipped bullish in his most recent video, declaring that 'The Bottom Is In' and predicting higher Bitcoin prices.
narrative: After spending months profiting from a bearish stance and shorting Ethereum, his latest analysis suggests the market correction has concluded and a bottom is forming. He points to new drivers like STRC and refutes popular 4-year cycle theories to support his thesis that Bitcoin is poised to move higher.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
